children.heading: Geographic area
children.label: 3 Geographic area
children.text: The term “geographic area” means the area in the State of Oregon within the boundaries of the Medford District, Roseburg District, Eugene District, Salem District, Coos Bay District, and Klamath Resource Area of the Lakeview District of the Bureau of Land Management, as the districts and the resource area were constituted on .January 1, 1998

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.heading: Policy of no net loss of O & C land and CBWR land
children.label: b Policy of no net loss of O & C land and CBWR land
children.text: In carrying out sales, purchases, and exchanges of land in the geographic area, the Secretary shall ensure that on , and on the expiration of each 10-year period thereafter, the number of acres of O & C land and CBWR land in the geographic area is not less than the number of acres of such land on .October 30, 2008October 30, 1998

children.heading: Relationship to Umpqua land exchange authority
children.label: c Relationship to Umpqua land exchange authority
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this section, this section shall not apply to an exchange of land authorized pursuant to section 1028 of the Omnibus Parks and Public Lands Management Act of 1996 (; ), or any implementing legislation or administrative rule, if the land exchange is consistent with the memorandum of understanding between the Umpqua Land Exchange Project and the Association of Oregon and California Land Grant Counties dated .Public Law 104–333110 Stat. 4231February 19, 1998
